headlines.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.18%, reaching the highest level in nearly 19 years
headlines.summary: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears.

headlines.title: Bessent urges G7 to help U.S. attack Iran's finances
headlines.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent urged a G7 conference to help the U.S. combat Iranian terrorism by "rooting out the financing that sustains it."

headlines.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
headlines.summary: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.

headlines.title: Home Depot says core shopper is resilient in the face of higher gas prices, sales rise 5%
headlines.summary: Home Depot beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, even as some shoppers pulled back on larger projects.

headlines.title: Startup backed by American Eagle CEO reaches unicorn status in latest funding round
headlines.summary: Radar, a hardware and software company that helps retailers better manage inventory and cut back on theft, is now valued at over $1 billion.

headlines.title: Putin in Beijing: 3 things Russia needs from China
headlines.summary: Russia will be looking for energy and trade deals with China, as well as continuing geopolitical support.

headlines.title: Software stocks stage 'mini' bull market. Some traders see more gains
headlines.summary: As semiconductor shares dragged down the Nasdaq-100 for a second day, quietly, software stocks appear to have found their groove.

headlines.title: Nvidia bulls mount uphill battle into earnings
headlines.summary: Call volume outpaced puts by more than double on Monday, though more calls were exchanged at the bid or below, meaning likely sold.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
headlines.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

headlines.title: Higher aluminum prices are powering one former Dow component. Here's how to buy for less
headlines.summary: Despite elevated aluminum production costs and shipment timing issues, Alcoa (AA) is strongly capitalizing on structurally higher prices.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.summary: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Here are the stocks to buy — and avoid — to protect your portfolio against oil and yield shocks
headlines.summary: Evercore strategists say as risks build for stocks, less-protected investors need more of these “all-weather” outperforming stocks.

headlines.title: Don’t worry about risk assets coming under pressure just yet, Deutsche Bank says
headlines.summary: The factors that led to aggressive selloffs in riskier assets during past energy shocks are not currently in place, analysts at Deutsche Bank said.

headlines.title: This hack can save you hundreds on airfare this summer
headlines.summary: Plus: AI prompts to plan your next vacation — and why “trip stacking” is trending.

headlines.title: ‘He didn’t really pay attention’: I told my friend he left millions on the table in retirement. Did I do the right thing?
headlines.summary: “He lived very frugally and maxed out his 401(k)s.”

headlines.title: Home Depot’s stock turns lower as a sales miss offsets a ‘mildly positive’ outlook
headlines.summary: Home Depot’s stock falls as earnings beat expectations but comparable sales rose less than Wall Street expected.

headlines.title: Investors haven’t been this bullish since the peak of the 2021 meme-stock frenzy, according to this chart
headlines.summary: By one measure, investors haven’t been this bulled up on stocks since the heady days of the original meme-stock frenzy back in 2021.
